title: Object-Oriented Programming Basics
content_md:
# Intro to OOP in Python

OOP organizes code into classes and objects.

```python
class Dog:
    def __init__(self, name):
        self.name = name

    def speak(self):
        return 'Woof!'
```

## Why OOP?
- Models real-world entities
- Makes code scalable

questions.question: What keyword is used to define a class?
Why use OOP?
questions.answer: It organizes code and models real-world entities.
